{{Infobox technique
| name = Forger technique
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Forger technique Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Forger]] technique is a method of manipulating [[madra]] by weaving it into specific patterns to give it physical form or appearance. This discipline allows practitioners to create various constructs, ranging from simple tools and weapons to complex illusions or defensive barriers. While some [[Forged]] objects can possess significant density and stability, many are temporary, eventually dissipating back into [[essence]]. The effectiveness of these techniques varies by [[Path]]; for example, those on the [[Path of the White Fox]] use the [[Fox Mirror technique]] to craft highly detailed illusions made of light and dreams that lack physical substance but can perfectly mimic reality. Other practitioners use [[Forging]] to create solid objects like blades, shields, or even massive weapons that can be enlarged through specific techniques. Advanced users may be able to imbue their creations with temporary [[life]] or use them to duplicate attacks through echo techniques. Because [[Forging]] requires intense concentration and the precise movement of [[madra]], it can be physically and spiritually taxing, potentially causing damage to a user's madra channels if overused. [[Forging]] is often used in conjunction with other disciplines, such as [[Enforcer]] or [[Striker techniques]], to create layered and more powerful combat effects.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[First Elder]] of the [[Wei clan]] is rumored to know the [[Forger technique]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Forging]] is a type of technique where [[madra]] stays solid for a few seconds before dissipating.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] was struck by a [[Highgold]]'s [[Forger technique]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] uses a [[Forger technique]] to create needles.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The character used a [[Forger technique]] to forge a blade beneath them while falling.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Forger technique]] used by the old woman contains a [[life]]-poison.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekerinatoth]] uses a whip-like [[Forger technique]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] uses a [[Forger technique]] to forge stars of [[pure madra]] in the air.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro]] activated his [[Forger technique]]: the [[Titan’s Blade]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Daji]] can release his [[Forger technique]] to return blades to their original length.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Forger technique]] can be used to create living owls made of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Forger technique]] can turn from gray to green.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Layering techniques may require using a [[Ruler technique]], [[Striker technique]], and [[Forger technique]] simultaneously.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The attackers use [[Forger techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Forger techniques]] were used by enemies during the battle.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A fragment of a broken [[Forger technique]] left behind pale light madra.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Forger techniques]] can be used to push targets with force.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Forger technique]] summons a massive beast claw constructed from bloody [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Forger technique]] was used to launch a [[blood madra]] spirit.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A specific [[Forger technique]] in the [[labyrinth]] can create an echo of a person.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Forger technique]] produces a gray, translucent cloak.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] consumes the [[Forger technique]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
